mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS "id", c.register_id AS "registerId", c.employee_id AS "employeeId", e.realname AS "employeeName", c.contact_date AS "contactDate", c.channel AS "channel", c.duration_minutes AS "durationMinutes", c.summary AS "summary", c.next_action AS "nextAction", c.created_at AS "createdAt" FROM follow_up_contact_record c LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = c.employee_id WHERE c.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY c.contact_date DESC, c.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.id AS "id", c.register_id AS "registerId", c.employee_id AS "employeeId", c.contact_date AS "contactDate", c.channel AS "channel", c.duration_minutes AS "durationMinutes", c.summary AS "summary", c.next_action AS "nextAction", c.created_at AS "createdAt" FROM follow_up_contact_record c WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
